headline: Netflix reportedly considers adding always-on channels
summary: Netflix is exploring adding always-on linear channels. These would stream specific shows and movies continuously. The model resembles ad-supported services like Pluto TV.

headline: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
summary: OpenAI is shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its AI browser. Atlas launched less than a year ago in October. The browser was designed to perform tasks on users' behalf.

headline: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
summary: The Anker Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is on sale for $69.99. This deal is available through July 10th on Woot. The speaker offers big sound and is floatable.

headline: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
summary: Google is introducing labels for AI-generated ads. Users can find this info in their "My Ad Center." Labels appear on ads in Search, Discover, and YouTube.

headline: Save Over 70% Off the Premium Harman Kardon Go + Play Portable Speaker, Now Just $129.99
summary: The Harman Kardon Go + Play Portable Speaker is on sale. Save over 70%, bringing the price to $129.99. It's touted as one of the best portable speakers under $200.

headline: Naruto Live-Action Movie Director, Studio Launch Worldwide Casting Search for Lead Roles
summary: Lionsgate and director Destin Daniel Cretton are casting a live-action Naruto movie. They've launched a global search for Team 7 roles. Looking for actors to play young Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura.

headline: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma Is Advising the Federal Reserve on the Economic Impact of AI as Part of a 'Productivity and Jobs' Taskforce
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is advising the Federal Reserve. She joins a taskforce on 'Productivity and Jobs.' Her role involves assessing AI's economic impact.

headline: The Excellent SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless Gaming Headset Drops to a New Price Low
summary: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset is at a new low price. Features hot-swappable batteries for continuous wireless use. Offers premium gaming audio experience with zero downtime.

headline: Burnham set to be next PM as 322 Labour MPs back him in first nomination tally
summary: Andy Burnham is poised to become the next UK Prime Minister. He has secured nominations from 322 Labour MPs. Burnham is currently unopposed in the leadership race.

headline: UK bakes in 35C highs as heatwave to continue next week
summary: The UK experienced 35C highs, marking an extended heatwave. Temperatures exceeded 34C for the eighth day this year. This sets a new record for heatwave duration in a calendar year.

headline: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
summary: The US and Iran engaged in reciprocal attacks. Centcom reported hitting 90 Iranian targets. 14 people were reportedly killed in Iranian strikes since Tuesday.

headline: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
summary: A Ukrainian agent, accused of murder, has altered his testimony. Two men linked to Ukraine's security services are implicated. They are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body.
